name: Presque Isle Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at Presque Isle Athletic Club in Rogers City, MI! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Presque Isle Harbor Association Clubhouse
description: Presque Isle Harbor Association Clubhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Presque Isle, MI. There are 2 acrylic courts. 1 is outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Rogers City High School
description: Rogers City High School is a place to play pickleball in Rogers City, MI. There are 7 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
